center.name: 凡波斯
center.summary: 凡波斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括Karoo korhaan、Striped flufftail、Fynbos buttonquail等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits semi-arid savanna, as well as grassland, fynbos, agricultural areas and urban gardens, which it did not inhabit formerly

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This locally common but shy and unobtrusive siskin is found in the southwestern and southern Cape's rocky slopes, coastal cliffs and fynbos-covered mountains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape weaver is endemic to South Africa, Lesotho and Eswatini, occurring across much of the area excluding the Kalahari Desert from the Orange River in the Northern Cape south to the Cape of Good Hope then east to northern KwaZulu Natal and inland almost to Bloemfontein in the Free State. The Cape weaver occurs in open grassland, lowland fynbos, coastal thicket and farmland, so long as there is permanent water and trees. In the more arid, hotter regions it is restricted to upland areas and it never occurs in forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This is a common species found in a range of habitats including fynbos, scrub, thickets and dry riverbeds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|In natural habitat The species is endemic to South Africa and is found along the south coast from Cape Town to Algoa Bay in Eastern Cape province where it occurs in mountain fynbos where vegetation is relatively sparse. A 1994 survey resulted in an estimate of c.310-420 birds in of montane fynbos habitat in Cape of Good Hope Nature Reserve

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A small population can also be found in karoo-like fynbos habitat in the Western Cape province. The karoo korhaan is a small bustard

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a species found in karoo scrub, fynbos and bracken-covered slopes in semi-desert and mountains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The little sparrowhawk occurs in eastern and southern sub-Saharan Africa from Ethiopia south to the southern Democratic Republic of Congo and northern Angola, south as far as the eastern Western Cape in South Africa. The little sparrowhawk is a woodland bird which can be found in patches of woodland and scrub, typically along river valleys. In drier areas it can be found in open areas such as fynbos and grassland, also in suburban gardens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|Male in South Africa thumb|right|Female feeding thumb|right|A breeding-plumage male feeding on Leonotis flower nectar. This large sunbird is found in hilly fynbos (including Protea stands as well as areas with aloes) and cool montane and coastal scrub, up to 2,800m altitude in South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It may be found in forest, savannah, grassland, wetlands, fynbos, farmlands and commercial plantations, as well as urban centres

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In South Africa, at lower altitudes, it is found in fynbos. left|thumb The striped flufftail feeds on a range of insects including beetles, caterpillars, ants, termites, flies, crickets and bugs, as well as spiders and seeds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This common weaver occurs in less arid vegetated areas, such as fynbos, moist grassland and bracken-covered valleys at altitudes from sea level to the Ethiopian Highlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Stenostira scita is a common seasonal migrant, breeding in karoo scrub and fynbos in the southern highlands, and migrating north in to spend the southern winter in thorn scrub at lower altitudes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape clapper lark is a species of open grassland and savannah, also inhabiting karoo, fynbos and fallow agricultural land

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This lark is also found in croplands, farmlands and coastal fynbos
